en.title: Quotes sent
en.description: Track every quote you have sent and follow up on customer responses.
en.emptyDescription: Browse open tasks near you and send your first quote to start earning.
en.activityEmpty: No quote activity yet. Send a quote to get started.

metadata.title: 報價 | Slashie
metadata.description: 查看你在 Slashie 任務傳送的報價，並追蹤顧客回覆。

zh_hk.title: 已傳送報價
zh_hk.description: 追蹤你傳送的每個報價，並跟進顧客回覆。
zh_hk.emptyDescription: 瀏覽附近公開任務並傳送第一個報價，開始賺取收入。
zh_hk.activityEmpty: 暫時沒有報價活動。傳送報價即可開始。
